pages.title: RetailConnect — Project Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the RetailConnect Angular 14 store management portal: what it does, its tech stack, how to run it locally. Links to child pages for architecture and setup details.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for setting up the development environment: Node.js version requirement (.nvmrc), npm install, npm start, and login credentials. Covers environment configuration files and the Angular CLI build pipeline.

pages.title: Application Architecture
pages.purpose: Overview of the NgModule-based architecture: AppModule bootstrap, lazy-loaded feature modules, CoreModule singleton pattern, SharedModule aggregation, and the overall directory layout. Links to child pages for each architectural layer.

pages.title: Core Module
pages.purpose: Deep dive into src/app/core/: the singleton services, route guard, and HTTP interceptor that form the application's infrastructure layer. Covers CoreModule's guard against double-import, AuthGuard (class-based CanActivate), AuthInterceptor (Bearer token injection and 401 handling), StorageService (localStorage wrapper), and NotificationService (MatSnackBar facade).

pages.title: Shared Module
pages.purpose: Covers src/app/shared/: the SharedModule that aggregates Angular Material imports, common components (Header, Sidebar, StatCard, DateRangePicker), data models, and the TruncatePipe. Explains the MATERIAL_MODULES constant pattern and how feature modules consume SharedModule.

pages.title: Shell Components: Header, Sidebar & StatCard
pages.purpose: Details the three layout/shell components in src/app/shared/components/: HeaderComponent (top navigation bar with sidenav toggle and user menu), SidebarComponent (vertical nav links to feature routes), and StatCardComponent (KPI metric card used on the dashboard). Covers inputs, outputs, and template structure.

pages.title: DateRangePicker Component
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the reusable DateRangePickerComponent: its Reactive Forms integration (FormGroup with start/end controls), Angular Material mat-date-range-input/mat-date-range-picker wiring, the maxDate constraint, Clear/Apply actions, and the fixed 280px width styling. Explains how it is consumed by OrderListComponent.

pages.title: Routing & Lazy Loading
pages.purpose: Explains the top-level AppRoutingModule route configuration: default redirect to /dashboard, lazy-loaded feature modules (dashboard, products, orders, customers), the /login public route, and the wildcard redirect. Covers how AuthGuard is applied to protected routes and the returnUrl query-param pattern.

pages.title: Feature Modules
pages.purpose: Overview of the four lazy-loaded feature areas (Dashboard, Products, Orders, Customers) and the Auth feature. Summarizes each module's purpose and links to child pages for detailed coverage.

pages.title: Authentication Feature
pages.purpose: Covers the Auth feature module (src/app/features/auth/): LoginComponent template and reactive form, credential validation flow via AuthService, returnUrl redirect after login, and the mock user credentials. Cross-references AuthService in CoreModule.

pages.title: Dashboard Feature
pages.purpose: Documents the Dashboard feature (src/app/features/dashboard/): DashboardComponent's use of combineLatest to aggregate stats (total revenue, active customers, pending orders, low-stock count) from three services, the recent orders list, low-stock products list, and how StatCard components display KPIs.

pages.title: Products Feature
pages.purpose: Covers the Products feature module (src/app/features/products/): ProductListComponent (MatTableDataSource with paginator/sort, search debounce, category filter, low-stock highlighting, delete), ProductFormComponent (reactive form for create/edit with validation, SKU pattern, isEditMode), ProductService (BehaviorSubject state, CRUD with simulated delay, getLowStockProducts), and MOCK_PRODUCTS seed data.

pages.title: Orders Feature
pages.purpose: Documents the Orders feature module (src/app/features/orders/): OrderListComponent (status filter chips, DateRangePicker integration, advance-status workflow, canAdvance guard), OrderDetailComponent (single order view), OrderService (BehaviorSubject state, updateStatus pipeline, getLatestOrderForCustomer switchMap, deprecated toPromise), and MOCK_ORDERS seed data.

pages.title: Customers Feature
pages.purpose: Covers the Customers feature module (src/app/features/customers/): CustomerListComponent (display of customer tier badges, status, spend), CustomerService (BehaviorSubject state, getActiveCount, getTopCustomers), and MOCK_CUSTOMERS seed data. Notes the read-only nature of the customer list compared to products.

pages.title: Data Layer & State Management
pages.purpose: Overview of how the application manages state without a backend: the BehaviorSubject pattern used across all services, localStorage persistence via StorageService, mock data seeds, and the storage key naming convention (rc_*). Links to child pages for service-specific details.

pages.title: Data Models
pages.purpose: Reference documentation for all TypeScript interfaces and types in src/app/shared/models/: Product (with ProductCategory union and ProductFilter), Order (with OrderItem, Address, and OrderStatus), and Customer (with CustomerTier and CustomerSummary). Includes field-by-field descriptions and relationships between models.

pages.title: Mock Data & Storage Keys
pages.purpose: Documents the mock data seed files (MOCK_PRODUCTS, MOCK_ORDERS, MOCK_CUSTOMERS, MOCK_USERS) used as fallback data when localStorage is empty. Lists all storage keys (rc_products, rc_orders, rc_customers, rc_auth_token, rc_auth_user) and explains the load-from-storage-or-fallback pattern used in each service.

pages.title: Styling System
pages.purpose: Overview of the application's SCSS architecture: global styles entry point, the retail-theme Angular Material configuration, and the material-overrides partial. Links to child pages for theme details and component-level styles.

pages.title: Global Styles & Retail Theme
pages.purpose: Deep dive into src/styles.scss: the $retail-theme construction (Indigo primary, Amber accent, Red warn), mat.core() and mat.all-component-themes() initialization, global reset (border-box, height 100%, Roboto font), .page-container, .section-title, .status-badge modifier classes (.active, .inactive, .pending, .completed, .cancelled), and the mat-card sibling spacing rule. Notes the deprecated @import and planned migration to @use/token API.

pages.title: Component-Level Styles
pages.purpose: Covers the SCSS patterns used at the component level across the application: encapsulated styles for order-list (filters-row, status-chips, chip-selected override with !important, full-width-table, order-link), product-list, product-form, login, dashboard, and shared components. Explains the #3f51b5 primary color usage and ViewEncapsulation defaults.

pages.title: Testing
pages.purpose: Documents the testing infrastructure and patterns used in the project: Karma/Jasmine setup (karma.conf.js, src/test.ts), the single existing spec file (ProductListComponent), TestBed configuration patterns, jasmine.SpyObj usage for service mocking, and the migration target of Jest. Covers tsconfig.spec.json and polyfills.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Definitions of all codebase-specific terms, Angular/RxJS jargon, abbreviations, and domain concepts that an onboarding engineer needs to know. Each entry includes a code pointer.
